message:
fix(hooks): per-matcher merge logic, error handling, rename runHooksList

- Rewrite Merge() to do per-matcher merging: same-matcher entries get
  replaced, different-matcher entries coexist, empty hooks list removes
  the entry (explicit disable). Fixes bug where overriding one matcher
  in a hook type would drop all other matchers.
- Fix runHooksBase/runHooksOverride to only create defaults on
  os.IsNotExist; corrupted files now surface errors instead of being
  silently replaced.
- Rename runHooksList to runHooksRegistry to avoid confusion with the
  new list command.
- Add tests for per-matcher preservation, different-matcher inclusion,
  and explicit disable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
